user.title: Häfele Connect Mesh
user.description:
Upload your Häfele `.connect` export file (exported from the Häfele Connect app → Menu → Settings → Export Configuration).

If file upload is not available on your client, paste the file contents into the text box instead.

confirm.title: Confirm Configuration
confirm.description:
Ready to set up **{node_count}** light(s):

{node_names}

IV Index: **{iv_index}**

Home Assistant will use its configured Bluetooth adapter (including ESPHome Bluetooth Proxies) to reach the mesh. Click Submit to continue.

error.invalid_config: Invalid or unrecognized .connect file. Make sure you exported a valid Häfele Connect Mesh configuration.
error.file_read_error: Could not read the uploaded file. Try again or paste the contents manually.
error.no_input: Please either upload a .connect file or paste its contents.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: Häfele Connect Mesh is already configured.
